growth_records.lvlwhy: species-level trait compilation (Madin) — no strain recorded in source
growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.strain: NCIMB 777 (type strain, isolated from salted cod)
growth_records.agit: 225 rpm (Halobacterium strain 004.1 rotary shaker); other halophile growth-rate cultures shaken/rotary
growth_records.medium: Modified Payne's medium supplemented with NaCl (Payne et al. 1960)
growth_records.cite: Stevenson et al. Is there a common water-activity limit for the three domains of life?. The ISME Journal (2015). DOI:10.1038/ismej.2014.219. [PMC4438321]
growth_records.snippet: Table 1: Natrinema pallidum (NCIMB 777): ~14 Days at water activity 0.681
growth_records.notes: Table 1 reports approximate doubling time '~14 Days' at water activity 0.681, modified Payne's medium+NaCl, 37C. mu=ln2/(14x24h)=0.00206 h-1. Approximate value (~) from source table. [metadata completed from paper Methods: oxygen]

phenotypes.base_medium: Sole-substrate growth / assimilation on a defined minimal medium (substrate as C/N/energy source) — positive = the organism grows on it
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 5889 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/5889

phenotypes.base_medium: Enzyme / activity assay (hydrolysis, degradation, reduction, electron transfer) in a test medium — not a sole-substrate growth test
